_comment: Media arrays keyed by problem ID. Populated in Phase 3 (graphical problem audit). Lazy-loaded via mediaLoader.js — NOT bundled in the initial JS chunk.

layers.type: CurveLayer | PointLayer | AsymptoteLayer | DiscontinuityLayer | RegionLayer | RiemannLayer | AnnotationLayer | VectorFieldLayer

fff_003.alt: Graph of f''(x): parabola crossing x-axis at x=2 (pos to neg) and x=6 (neg to pos). Graph of f'(x): curve with root at x=4.

sf_001.alt: Slope field for dy/dx = x - y on [-3, 3] x [-3, 3] with initial point at (0, 1)

abc_003.alt: Graph of f(x) = downward parabola through (0,4), vertex (2,6), (4,4), and g(x) = 2 constant line. Shaded region between f and g on [0, 4].

ct_003.alt: Graph of p(x) near x=1: approaches 3 from left, 5 from right. p(1)=3 (closed dot). Open circle at (1,5). Jump discontinuity.

id_003.alt: Graph of f'(x): piecewise horizontal lines. y=-2 for x<1, y=3 for 1<x<4, y=-1 for x>4. Jump discontinuities at x=1 and x=4.

con_003.alt: Graph of f'(x) as a decreasing line from (0, 3) to (6, -3), crossing x-axis at x=3

re_003.alt: Graph of f'(x) crossing x-axis at x=-1 (positive to negative) and x=3 (negative to positive)

layers.text: f' + to - : rel max of f
f' - to + : rel min of f

ip_003.alt: Graph of f'(x) with a local maximum at x=3. f' increases then decreases, peaking at x=3.

layers.text: f' has local max at x=3

la_003.alt: Graph of f(x) passing through (2,5) with tangent line of slope -3 at x=2. Tangent line shown as dashed.

sv_003.alt: Slope field for dy/dx = x/y on [-3,3]x[-3,3] with initial point at (0,2)

sf_002.alt: Direction field I: slopes zero along y=0 and y=1, positive between, negative outside. Matches dy/dx = y(1-y).
Direction field II: slopes zero only along y=0, positive above, negative below. dy/dx = y.
Direction field III: slopes depend only on x. dy/dx = x. Vertical columns have same slope.
Direction field IV: slopes zero along x=0 and x=1. dy/dx = x(1-x). Slopes depend only on x.

pm_003.alt: Graph of v(t): piecewise linear velocity from (0,4) to (2,-2) to (4,2) to (6,-1). Crosses zero at t=4/3, t=3, t=16/3.

sq_003.alt: Three functions near x=0: y=-|x| (lower bound), y=f(x) oscillating, y=|x| (upper bound). All pass through origin.

fff_005.alt: Graph of f'(x): straight line through (0,3) and (6,-3), crossing x-axis at x=3.

fff_007.alt: Graph of f''(x) = 2: horizontal line at y=2 for all x.

sf_009.alt: Slope field for dP/dt = P(4-P)-3 showing equilibria at P=1 (unstable) and P=3 (stable). t on x-axis, P on y-axis.
